title: True Gamer Mode
description: Experience the true gamers dreams. Well... nightmares.
body:
Become a true gamer while gaming...

- Grass explodes when you touch it
- The sun kills you
- You're so out of shape; walking and mining are fatiguing to do for longer than like 10 seconds

It's recommended to match on both server, and client side.

Thats about it.
